scripts.text: UPDATE [dbo].[tb_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] SET processed_bit = 1, processed_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE ISNULL(processed_bit, 0) = 0; UPDATE [dbo].[tb_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] SET processed_bit = 1, processed_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE ISNULL(processed_bit, 0) = 0;

text.value: @concat('INSERT INTO [dbo].[tb_integration_transaction_log] ([pipeline_name],[pipeline_run_id],[activity_name],[activity_type],[step_name],[execution_status],[severity],[source_system],[target_system],[entity_name],[correlation_id],[transaction_id],[file_name],[document_id],[message],[error_code],[error_message],[start_time_utc],[end_time_utc],[created_by],[created_at_utc],[status],[success_flag],[created_at],[updated_at]) VALUES (''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''Mark as Processed'',''Script'',''Finalize Staging Rows'',''Failed'',''Error'',''UIS SQL'',''UIS SQL'',''SoftCo AP Invoice'',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''', replace(string(variables('file_name')), '''', ''''''), ''', TRY_CAST(''', replace(string(variables('document_id')), '''', ''''''), ''' AS bigint), ''Failed to mark staging rows as processed after downstream success.'',''', replace(string(activity('Mark as Processed').error.code), '''', ''''''), ''',''', replace(string(activity('Mark as Processed').error.message), '''', ''''''), ''', TRY_CAST(''', variables('pipeline_start_utc'), ''' AS datetime2), SYSUTCDATETIME(), ''ADF'', SYSUTCDATETIME(), ''failed'', 0, SYSUTCDATETIME(), SYSUTCDATETIME())')

typeProperties.message: Failed to mark staging rows as processed.

text.value: @concat('INSERT INTO [dbo].[tb_integration_transaction_log] ([pipeline_name],[pipeline_run_id],[activity_name],[activity_type],[step_name],[execution_status],[severity],[source_system],[target_system],[entity_name],[correlation_id],[transaction_id],[file_name],[message],[start_time_utc],[end_time_utc],[created_by],[created_at_utc],[status],[success_flag],[created_at],[updated_at]) VALUES (''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''Pipeline Success Log'',''Script'',''Pipeline Complete'',''Succeeded'',''Info'',''UIS SQL'',''Fusion AP'',''SoftCo AP Invoice'',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''', replace(string(variables('file_name')), '''', ''''''), ''',''Pipeline completed successfully and staging rows were marked processed.'', TRY_CAST(''', variables('pipeline_start_utc'), ''' AS datetime2), SYSUTCDATETIME(), ''ADF'', SYSUTCDATETIME(), ''succeeded'', 1, SYSUTCDATETIME(), SYSUTCDATETIME())')
